title: Trump discusses phone call with Chinese President Xi Jinping, says sides will resume trade talks
description: President Trump told reporters Thursday about his phone call with China's Xi Jinping. CBS News' Aaron Navarro reports.
keywords: Xi Jinping, Donald Trump, Politics, Democrats
